mapper.sql: id, emp_id, old_pos_id, new_pos_id, old_job_level_id, new_job_level_id, reason, apply_time, approver_id, approve_time, approve_remark, status
mapper.select:
SELECT e.id, e.emp_id AS empId, e.old_pos_id AS oldPosId, e.new_pos_id AS newPosId, e.old_job_level_id AS oldJobLevelId, e.new_job_level_id AS newJobLevelId, e.reason, DATE_FORMAT(e.apply_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS applyTime, e.approver_id AS approverId, DATE_FORMAT(e.approve_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS approveTime, e.approve_remark AS approveRemark, e.status, ee.`name` as applyName, aa.`name` as approverName, p1.`name` as oldPosName, j1.`name` as oldJobName, p2.`name` as newPosName, j2.`name` as newJobName FROM employee_promotion e left join position p1 on e.old_pos_id = p1.id LEFT JOIN position p2 ON e.new_pos_id = p2.id LEFT JOIN joblevel j1 on e.old_job_level_id = j1.id LEFT JOIN joblevel j2 on e.new_job_level_id = j2.id LEFT JOIN employee ee on e.emp_id = ee.id LEFT JOIN employee aa on e.approver_id = aa.id where e.emp_id = #{empId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
limit #{page},#{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee_promotion e left join position p1 on e.old_pos_id = p1.id LEFT JOIN position p2 ON e.new_pos_id = p2.id LEFT JOIN joblevel j1 on e.old_job_level_id = j1.id LEFT JOIN joblevel j2 on e.new_job_level_id = j2.id LEFT JOIN employee ee on e.emp_id = ee.id LEFT JOIN employee aa on e.approver_id = aa.id where e.emp_id = #{empId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert: insert into employee_promotion (emp_id, old_pos_id, new_pos_id, old_job_level_id, new_job_level_id, reason, apply_time, approver_id, approve_time, approve_remark, status) values (#{empId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{oldPosId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{newPosId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{oldJobLevelId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{newJobLevelId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{approverId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{approveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{approveRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT})

insert into employee_promotion
emp_id,
old_pos_id,
new_pos_id,
old_job_level_id,
new_job_level_id,
reason,
apply_time,
approver_id,
approve_time,
approve_remark,
status,
#{empId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{oldPosId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{newPosId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{oldJobLevelId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{newJobLevelId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{applyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{approverId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{approveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{approveRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
mapper.update:
update employee_promotion
emp_id = #{empId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
old_pos_id = #{oldPosId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
new_pos_id = #{newPosId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
old_job_level_id = #{oldJobLevelId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
new_job_level_id = #{newJobLevelId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
apply_time = #{applyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
approver_id = #{approverId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
approve_time = #{approveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
approve_remark = #{approveRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update employee_promotion set emp_id = #{empId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, old_pos_id = #{oldPosId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, new_pos_id = #{newPosId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, old_job_level_id = #{oldJobLevelId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, new_job_level_id = #{newJobLevelId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, apply_time = #{applyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, approver_id = #{approverId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, approve_time = #{approveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, approve_remark = #{approveRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
